response.justification: Candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and Green Map projects, plus proven high-throughput systems thinking from Dunnhumby. However, C++ expertise is significantly outdated (last relevant work ~2015), and the last 5+ years have focused on web/full-stack development with no recent systems programming or Rust experience. Career trajectory moving away from systems engineering raises concerns about motivation and technical depth for this role.
strengths: Deep geospatial and navigation systems domain knowledge from GISCollective and Green Map projects
Demonstrated high-throughput system design experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second with low-latency optimization
Strong software craftsmanship culture with proven expertise in TDD, quality assurance, and building well-tested systems
concerns: C++ experience significantly outdated (2015 or earlier) with no recent commercial or open-source C++ work; last 5+ years focused on JavaScript/TypeScript
Recent career trajectory moving toward web/full-stack engineering rather than systems-level programming, suggesting potential motivation misalignment with role
No Rust experience listed despite it being an acceptable alternative for the primary technical requirement

key_factors.factor: Outdated C++ skills and systems programming gap
Geospatial domain expertise and GIS platform experience
Recent career focus on web development vs. systems engineering
